name: manifold-codex
description: Constraint-first development workflows for Codex. Bundles Manifold commands, skills, and hook-aware project guidance.

interface.longDescription: Manifold for Codex packages command-style workflows, reusable skills, and distribution-friendly plugin scaffolding around the initialize, constrain, tension, anchor, generate, verify, integrate, and parallel phases.
defaultPrompt: Use Manifold to initialize a feature and discover its constraints.
Use Manifold to verify whether generated artifacts satisfy all invariants.
